info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API, ADOM version 7.2

SD-WAN Template manages a subset of configuration of system virtual-wan-link or system sdwan object at device VDOM level. Once a template is assigned to a device, all configuration will be copied onto the device during the next install.

  • Prefix /pm/wanprof/adom/ is used to access or modify the template and assignment.
  • Prefix /pm/config/adom/wanprof/ is used to access the system virtual-wan-link or system sdwan objects managed.

All objects that are reference by the template are shared, and are listed under ADOM Level Objects.

tags.name: /pm/config/system/sdwan
tags.description: Configure redundant Internet connections with multiple outbound links and health-check profiles.

tags.name: /pm/config/system/sdwan/health-check
tags.description: SD-WAN status checking or health checking. Identify a server on the Internet and determine how SD-WAN verifies that the FortiGate can communicate with it.

tags.name: /pm/config/system/sdwan/members
tags.description: FortiGate interfaces added to the SD-WAN.

tags.name: /pm/config/system/sdwan/neighbor
tags.description: Create SD-WAN neighbor from BGP neighbor table to control route advertisements according to SLA status.

tags.name: /pm/config/system/sdwan/service
tags.description: Create SD-WAN rules (also called services) to control how sessions are distributed to interfaces in the SD-WAN.

common.filter.object.description: Filter the result according to a set of criteria.

common.range.object.description: Limit the number of output. For a range of [a, n], the output will contain n elements, starting from the ath matching result.

common.sort.object.description: Specify the sorting of the returned result.

name.description: Status check or health check name.

ip.description: Support meta variable IP/IPv6 address of neighbor.

params.cdb.get.obj.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the object will be returned.
scope member - Return a list of scope members along with other attributes.
chksum - Return the check-sum value instead of attributes.
datasrc - Return all objects that can be referenced by an attribute. Require attr parameter.

params.cdb.get.table.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the objects will be returned.
count - Return the number of matching entries instead of the actual entry data.
scope member - Return a list of scope members along with other attributes.
datasrc - Return all objects that can be referenced by an attribute. Require attr parameter.
get reserved - Also return reserved objects in the result.
syntax - Return the attribute syntax of a table or an object, instead of the actual entry data. All filter parameters will be ignored.

duplication-max-num.description: Maximum number of interface members a packet is duplicated in the SD-WAN zone (2 - 4, default = 2; if set to 3, the original packet plus 2 more copies are created).

items.description: Support meta variable Physical interfaces that will be alerted.

fail-alert-interfaces.description: Support meta variable Physical interfaces that will be alerted.

fail-detect.description: Enable/disable SD-WAN Internet connection status checking (failure detection).

load-balance-mode.description: Algorithm or mode to use for load balancing Internet traffic to SD-WAN members.

neighbor-hold-boot-time.description: Waiting period in seconds when switching from the primary neighbor to the secondary neighbor from the neighbor start. (0 - 10000000, default = 0).

neighbor-hold-down.description: Enable/disable hold switching from the secondary neighbor to the primary neighbor.

neighbor-hold-down-time.description: Waiting period in seconds when switching from the secondary neighbor to the primary neighbor when hold-down is disabled. (0 - 10000000, default = 0).

speedtest-bypass-routing.description: Enable/disable bypass routing when speedtest on a SD-WAN member.

items.description: Destination address or address group names.

dstaddr.description: Destination address or address group names.

items.description: Destination address6 or address6 group names.

dstaddr6.description: Destination address6 or address6 group names.

packet-de-duplication.description: Enable/disable discarding of packets that have been duplicated.

sla-match-service.description: Enable/disable packet duplication matching health-check SLAs in service rule.

items.description: Source address or address group names.

srcaddr.description: Source address or address group names.

items.description: Source address6 or address6 group names.

srcaddr6.description: Source address6 or address6 group names.

detect-mode.description: The mode determining how to detect the server.

diffservcode.description: Differentiated services code point (DSCP) in the IP header of the probe packet.

dns-match-ip.description: Response IP expected from DNS server if the protocol is DNS.

dns-request-domain.description: Fully qualified domain name to resolve for the DNS probe.

failtime.description: Support meta variable Number of failures before server is considered lost (1 - 3600, default = 5).

ftp-file.description: Full path and file name on the FTP server to download for FTP health-check to probe.

http-agent.description: String in the http-agent field in the HTTP header.

http-get.description: URL used to communicate with the server if the protocol if the protocol is HTTP.

http-match.description: Response string expected from the server if the protocol is HTTP.

interval.description: Support meta variable Status check interval in milliseconds, or the time between attempting to connect to the server (20 - 3600*1000 msec, default = 500).

mos-codec.description: Codec to use for MOS calculation (default = g711).

name.description: Status check or health check name.

packet-size.description: Packet size of a TWAMP test session.

password.description: TWAMP controller password in authentication mode.

port.description: Port number used to communicate with the server over the selected protocol (0 - 65535, default = 0, auto select. http, tcp-connect: 80, udp-echo, tcp-echo: 7, dns: 53, ftp: 21, twamp: 862).

probe-count.description: Number of most recent probes that should be used to calculate latency and jitter (5 - 30, default = 30).

probe-timeout.description: Support meta variable Time to wait before a probe packet is considered lost (20 - 3600*1000 msec, default = 500).

protocol.description: Protocol used to determine if the FortiGate can communicate with the server.

quality-measured-method.description: Method to measure the quality of tcp-connect.

recoverytime.description: Support meta variable Number of successful responses received before server is considered recovered (1 - 3600, default = 5).

server.description: Support meta variable IP address or FQDN name of the server.

sla-fail-log-period.description: Time interval in seconds that SLA fail log messages will be generated (0 - 3600, default = 0).

sla-id-redistribute.description: Select the ID from the SLA sub-table. The selected SLA's priority value will be distributed into the routing table (0 - 32, default = 0).

sla-pass-log-period.description: Time interval in seconds that SLA pass log messages will be generated (0 - 3600, default = 0).

source.description: Support meta variable Source IP address used in the health-check packet to the server.

system-dns.description: Enable/disable system DNS as the probe server.

threshold-alert-packetloss.description: Alert threshold for packet loss (percentage, default = 0).

threshold-warning-packetloss.description: Warning threshold for packet loss (percentage, default = 0).

user.description: The user name to access probe server.

jitter-threshold.description: Support meta variable Jitter for SLA to make decision in milliseconds. (0 - 10000000, default = 5).

latency-threshold.description: Support meta variable Latency for SLA to make decision in milliseconds. (0 - 10000000, default = 5).

link-cost-factor.description: Criteria on which to base link selection.

mos-threshold.description: Support meta variable Minimum Mean Opinion Score for SLA to be marked as pass. (1.0 - 5.0, default = 3.6).

packetloss-threshold.description: Support meta variable Packet loss for SLA to make decision in percentage. (0 - 100, default = 0).

priority-in-sla.description: Value to be distributed into routing table when in-sla (0 - 65535, default = 0).

priority-out-sla.description: Value to be distributed into routing table when out-sla (0 - 65535, default = 0).

cost.description: Support meta variable Cost of this interface for services in SLA mode (0 - 4294967295, default = 0).

gateway.description: Support meta variable The default gateway for this interface. Usually the default gateway of the Internet service provider that this interface is connected to.

ingress-spillover-threshold.description: Support meta variable Ingress spillover threshold for this interface (0 - 16776000 kbit/s). When this traffic volume threshold is reached, new sessions spill over to other interfaces in the SD-WAN.

priority.description: Support meta variable Priority of the interface for IPv4 (1 - 65535, default = 1). Used for SD-WAN rules or priority rules.

priority6.description: Support meta variable Priority of the interface for IPv6 (1 - 65535, default = 1024). Used for SD-WAN rules or priority rules.

source.description: Support meta variable Source IP address used in the health-check packet to the server.

source6.description: Support meta variable Source IPv6 address used in the health-check packet to the server.

spillover-threshold.description: Support meta variable Egress spillover threshold for this interface (0 - 16776000 kbit/s). When this traffic volume threshold is reached, new sessions spill over to other interfaces in the SD-WAN.

status.description: Enable/disable this interface in the SD-WAN.

volume-ratio.description: Support meta variable Measured volume ratio (this value / sum of all values = percentage of link volume, 1 - 255).

weight.description: Support meta variable Weight of this interface for weighted load balancing. (1 - 255) More traffic is directed to interfaces with higher weights.

ip.description: Support meta variable IP/IPv6 address of neighbor.

minimum-sla-meet-members.description: Minimum number of members which meet SLA when the neighbor is preferred.

mode.description: What metric to select the neighbor.

agent-exclusive.description: Set/unset the service as agent use exclusively.

bandwidth-weight.description: Coefficient of reciprocal of available bidirectional bandwidth in the formula of custom-profile-1.

default.description: Enable/disable use of SD-WAN as default service.

dst-negate.description: Enable/disable negation of destination address match.

hash-mode.description: Hash algorithm for selected priority members for load balance mode.

hold-down-time.description: Waiting period in seconds when switching from the back-up member to the primary member (0 - 10000000, default = 0).

input-device-negate.description: Enable/disable negation of input device match.

internet-service.description: Enable/disable use of Internet service for application-based load balancing.

internet-service-app-ctrl.description: Application control based Internet Service ID list.

internet-service-app-ctrl-category.description: IDs of one or more application control categories.

items.description: Application control based Internet Service group list.

internet-service-app-ctrl-group.description: Application control based Internet Service group list.

jitter-weight.description: Coefficient of jitter in the formula of custom-profile-1.

latency-weight.description: Coefficient of latency in the formula of custom-profile-1.

link-cost-threshold.description: Percentage threshold change of link cost values that will result in policy route regeneration (0 - 10000000, default = 10).

minimum-sla-meet-members.description: Minimum number of members which meet SLA.

mode.description: Control how the SD-WAN rule sets the priority of interfaces in the SD-WAN.

packet-loss-weight.description: Coefficient of packet-loss in the formula of custom-profile-1.

passive-measurement.description: Enable/disable passive measurement based on the service criteria.

role.description: Service role to work with neighbor.

sla-compare-method.description: Method to compare SLA value for SLA mode.

src-negate.description: Enable/disable negation of source address match.

standalone-action.description: Enable/disable service when selected neighbor role is standalone while service role is not standalone.

tie-break.description: Method of selecting member if more than one meets the SLA.

use-shortcut-sla.description: Enable/disable use of ADVPN shortcut for quality comparison.

service-sla-tie-break.description: Method of selecting member if more than one meets the SLA.

fields.description: Specified fields to retrieve for the package objects. If none specified, only name, type, and sub-objects will be returned.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Package or template full path and name.

attr.description: The name of the attribute to retrieve its datasource. Only used with datasrc option.

fields.description: Limit the output by returning only the attributes specified in the string array. If none specified, all attributes will be returned.

loadsub.description: Enable or disable the return of any sub-objects. If not specified, the default is to return all sub-objects.
